name: environmental_health_heat_dome_stresses_stonehaven_st_lt
premise: Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: environmental health heat dome stresses stonehaven st lt. The moral tension is explicitly framed as short term versus long term: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Insurance and risk are insisting on a paper trail before any irreversible action; operations says delay costs measurable harm. The breach-notification and customer-communication clock has started; executive staff expect a single coherent position before the next press cycle. Treat unverified telemetry as hypothesis; do not assert facts you cannot support from retained logs. Anyone affected by an automated hold or model output must retain a human escalation path that is actually staffed.

agents.name: Leila Serrano
agents.identity: I am Leila Serrano, the accountable decision-maker on this Environmental Health bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes long term whenever someone invokes short term.

agents.name: Leila Morales
agents.identity: I am Leila Morales, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so long term is not sacrificed by default just because short term feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect long term.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to long term to secure short term before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The clock on this bridge is running out. With partial evidence, Leila Serrano must decide under short term versus long term. What does Leila Serrano do?
